source: GHS-BUILT-H R2023A AGBH E2018 (JRC anonymous FTP, tile R5_C21) x GHS-BUILT-S R2023A E2020 (same FTP/tile) as the built-up-2020 extent mask
note: AGL height, 100 m cell average, 2018. Histogram counts 100 m GHSL cells within the Attica bbox whose GHS-BUILT-S 2020 value is > 0 m^2 (i.e. inside the built-up-2020 extent), binned by AGBH cell-average height, 3 m steps.
